Service

Roof Repairs & Maintenance

Emergency roof repairs, leak detection, tile replacement, gutter repairs. Fast response across Melbourne.

A small leak today is a big problem tomorrow.

Roof repairs we handle:

  • Leak detection & repair
  • Tile replacement with matching profiles
  • Ridge capping repairs
  • Gutter repairs — leaking joints, sagging sections
  • Flashing repairs — valley, chimney, wall flashing
  • Storm damage — emergency tarping

Most leaks diagnosed and repaired within 48 hours.

Want to know what this would cost?

Send us a brief description of your project and we will get back to you with a rough range and a recommendation.

Contact us
Smart Choice Roof Restorations

Melbourne's trusted roof restoration specialists. Tile, metal, and gutter services backed by 15+ years experience and a 10-year workmanship guarantee.
